caption: The video captures a significant event celebrating the foundation day of the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP). The scene is divided into two main frames: on the left, a prominent figure, likely a high-ranking party leader or politician, is seen addressing the audience. He is dressed in traditional attire with an orange and green scarf draped over his shoulders, and he gestures emphatically as he speaks. On the right, a large gathering of party members and supporters, also adorned in similar scarves and caps, attentively listens to the speech. The backdrop features repeated BJP logos, reinforcing the party's identity. The atmosphere appears formal and celebratory, with the audience seated in rows, indicating a well-organized event. The video is being broadcast live, as indicated by the "Live" text and social media handles displayed at the bottom of the screen.
